department: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

external_services.service_name: Application for Business Permit – New Applications

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Barangay Clearance w/ official receipt – 1 original & 1 photocopy
Location Plan or sketch of the location, clearly showing where business premises is located
DTI Registration (for single Proprietorship) – 1 photocopy
SEC Registration with Articles of Incorporation/Partnership and By-Laws (for Corporation/Partnership) – 1 photocopy
CDA Registration (for Cooperatives) – 1 photocopy
Homeowner’s Clearance, if applicable -1 photocopy
Market Certification-for Public Market Stallholders - original copy
Proof of right of applicant to use location as business address (TCT, Tax Declaration, or Contract of Lease)
Authority to Process (if not the owner) - original copy
Franchise Agreement (for franchised business) - 1 photocopy
Tax Declaration of Lot/ Building/Machinery - 2 photocopies
Updated Real Property Tax Receipt - 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Land Tax Division-Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Occupational Permit with CTC (for 4 employees & below) – original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Masterlist of employees (for 5 employees or more) - original copy
Certificate of Occupancy, if necessary - 1 photocopy
Locational Clearance - 1 photocopy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Sanitary Permit to Operate - 1 photocopy
Fire Safety Inspection Certificate - 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: Submit Accomplished Business Permit Application Form with required documents
steps.agency_action: Receive and preliminarily evaluate application; forward to BOSS backroom; encode information
steps.person_responsible: Licensing Officer III, License Inspector II, BOSS Backroom Staff

steps.client_step: Payment of corresponding fees and taxes at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: Validate RPT, print TOP, receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees_to_be_paid: In accordance with 1993 Revised Revenue Code and Tax Ordinance No. 132

steps.client_step: Submit application for release of permits and other clearances
steps.agency_action: Process clearances, print Mayor's Permit, approve and release
steps.person_responsible: City Permits and Licensing Officer, Admin Aide VI

external_services.service_name: Application for Renewal of Business Permits

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Barangay Clearance w/ Official Receipt – 1 original, 1 photocopy
Statement of Gross Sales Receipts – 1 original copy
Fire Safety Inspection Certificate - 1 photocopy
Sanitary Permit to Operate - 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: Submit Accomplished Business Permit Application Form
steps.agency_action: Evaluate application and assessment of Gross Receipts
steps.person_responsible: Licensing Officer III, Planning Officer IV

steps.client_step: Payment of corresponding fees and taxes
steps.agency_action: Issue Official Receipt and release application
steps.fees_to_be_paid: Based on Revenue Code and Fire Code

steps.client_step: Return and submit application for release of permit
steps.agency_action: Print and release Mayor's Permit Certificate

external_services.service_name: Business Registration – Transfer of Business Location, for establishments with issued Mayor’s Permit for the current year
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Business Registration – Transfer of Business Location, for establishments

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Notice of transfer of location (Affidavit or Board Resolution)
Locational Clearance - 1 photocopy
Proof of right to use location (TCT or Lease Contract)
Fire Safety Inspection Certificate for Occupancy

steps.client_step: Submit Accomplished Application Form
steps.agency_action: Preliminary evaluation and forward to CPDO for inspection
steps.person_responsible: Planning Officer IV, Licensing Officer III

steps.client_step: Pay corresponding fees
Return application for issuance of new certificate
steps.agency_action: Update record, print and approve new certificate

external_services.service_name: Application for Mayor’s Permit – Transfer of Ownership, for establishments with issued Mayor’s Permit for the current year
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Mayor’s Permit – Transfer of Ownership, for establishments

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Deed of Sale or Affidavit of Transfer
DTI/SEC/CDA Registration in new owner's name
Current Mayor's Permit Issued to former owner

steps.client_step: Submit Accomplished Application Form
steps.agency_action: Evaluate application and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: Pay the corresponding fee
steps.fees_to_be_paid: P250.00 certificate fee + Transfer Fee (1% or P500 whichever is lower)

steps.client_step: Submit application for issuance of new Permit

external_services.service_name: Application for Mayor’s Permit for Public Utility Vehicles (PUVs)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Mayor’s Permit for Public Utility Vehicles (PUVs)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Duly filled-up Application Form
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Updated Official Receipt and Certificate of Registration
LTFRB Decision
Driver's License

steps.client_step: Submit Accomplished PUV Permit Application Form
steps.agency_action: Preliminary evaluation and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: Pay the fees at the City Treasurer's Office
Submit application and claim Mayor’s Permit and sticker

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Barangay Certification or Mall Certification
Last Mayor's Permit and Business Plate
Statement of Gross Income

steps.client_step: Submit Accomplished Business Retirement Form
Pay the corresponding tax/ fees
Submit application for issuance of Certification
steps.agency_action: Prepare and approve Certification of Retirement

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Community Tax Certificate (CTC)
Official Receipt for payment of Occupational Fee

steps.client_step: Submit requirements and accomplished form
steps.agency_action: Receive, approve, and release Occupational Permit

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Currently Issued Mayor's/ Business Permit - 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: Submit Accomplished Application Form
Pay the corresponding fees
steps.fees_to_be_paid: P1,000 to P3,000 (New) or 1% of total collected (Renewal)

steps.client_step: Return and submit application for issuance of Permit

external_services.service_name: Application for Certification of No Business Record/ Business Retirement/ Last Mayor's Permit Issued/ Good Track Record/ Mayor's Permit on Process/ Other Certifications
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Certification of No Business Record_ Business Retirement_ Last Mayor's Permit Issued_Good Track Record_ Mayor's Permit on Process_Other Certifications

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter Request - original copy
Official Receipt for payment of certification

steps.client_step: Submit request for certification
steps.agency_action: Verify records and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: Pay the corresponding fee
Submit Official Receipt and claim certification

external_services.who_may_avail: Business owners on seasonal basis (3 months or less)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Location Sketch of the New Business
Sworn Statement of Capital Investment
Locational Clearance
Tax Receipt / Clearance

steps.client_step: Submit Accomplished Application Form
Pay the corresponding fees
Submit application for issuance of Certificate
